spec_match.rationale: Exercises a real surface of the spec's headline behaviour — WebTransport requests to local network / loopback gated behind permission prompt…

interactive.rationale: 9 buttons / 1 inputs / 0 selects / 0 ranges driving live JS — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates the feature-index blurb's key promise (overlap on attack, case, home, legitimate).

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles real failure modes — feature detection, permission rejection, fallback paths are all wired into the script.

references.rationale: Page includes the chromestatus.com/feature/5126430912544768 link in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: Mostly on the design system but 1 raw hex literal(s) leaked into inline CSS — should be replaced with the --accent / --text / --bg variables.

openQuestions.title: Replace raw hex colours with design-system variables
openQuestions.detail: Found 1 raw hex literal(s) in the inline <style> block. The shared system defines --accent-blue, --accent-emerald, --accent-rose, --bg-ivory, --bg-paper, --bg-stone, --text-black, --text-charcoal, --text-muted. Swap them in and re-check WCAG AA contrast.

summary: attack-scenario under local-network-access-restrictions-for-webtransport: 5 pass / 1 partial / 0 fail. Strong interactive surface, design-system drift, spec story complete.
